AVEMUJICA-AVE_MUJICA.aromaPrinciple: [sine][blue]I must persevere... for the sake of my companions... [/blue][/sine]
AVEMUJICA-AVE_MUJICA.cardsModifierDescri: Oblivionis cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
AVEMUJICA-AVE_MUJICA.description:
The dreamspinner issued a challenge:
ascend the spire or be trapped in slumber forevermore.
AVEMUJICA-AVE_MUJICA.eventDeathPreventio: I have been entrusted with the lives of my companions.
AVEMUJICA-AVE_MUJICA.goldMonologue: Wealth has no meaning without a strong conviction behind it.
AVEMUJICA-AVE_MUJICA.title: Oblivionis
